title: M365 Authoritative Persona Registry Rebase v1
notes: H3 projects the authoritative roster from 39 to 59 personas across the existing 10 departments.
The staged registry truth remains 34 active personas and 25 planned personas before H5 activation.
Promoted personas are authoritative in H3 but remain persona-contract-only with zero actions and zero domains.
The capability map clears the 20-agent non-authoritative overflow set without widening the department model.
